errors.ERR_GUARDRAIL_FAILED: The guardrail checks defined in the config failed. You can find more information in the 'hook_results' object.
errors.ERR_REQUEST_TIMEOUT: Request exceeded the timeout sent in the request: {{timeout}}ms
errors.ERR_INVALID_RESPONSE: Response format is invalid. Body not found
errors.ERR_NO_PROVIDER: No provider selected, please check the weights
errors.ERR_MISSING_PROVIDER_HEADER: Either x-{{powered_by}}-config or x-{{powered_by}}-provider header is required
errors.ERR_CONFIG_VERSION_UNSUPPORTED: This version of config is not supported in this route. Please migrate to the latest version
errors.ERR_INVALID_FORWARD_HEADERS: forward_headers must not contain the '{{header}}' header
errors.ERR_CANNOT_LOG_COMMITTED: Cannot log from a committed log object
